title: Does the Top of the Webpage Ever Change
display_title: Does the Top of the Webpage Ever Change
wikitext:
[]: Does the Top of the Webpage Ever Change?             Quote Post by Fleetleader101 » Mon Oct 10, 2011 7:02 pm I think it would be funny if the comments on the chalkboard up top would change every few weeks. Do they? My favorites are inner lesbian and big irony bomb lol

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Mon Oct 10, 2011 7:05 pm It changed on April Fools Day once.

[]:             Quote Post by Fleetleader101 » Mon Oct 10, 2011 9:17 pm too bad I didnt see it. Lol i just noticed Adam... our mother, thats a pretty good one too.

[]: It's us. B)             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Mon Oct 10, 2011 10:09 pm You can find definitions for a good number of them in the Geektionary . Some, like Go Hikari! , refer to threads, and in this case also the picture that inspired it.
